purpose: Defines a non-mutating pilot-only import scan contract for the first 10 weapon/class source sprite files.
rules: This contract scans incoming files and creates a pilot-only import plan; it must not copy, move, overwrite, or promote files.
Pilot incoming files match the 10 pilot source prompts by exact file name, including gender, tone, motion, frame, and source suffix.
Non-pilot planned files are reported separately and should not block the pilot-only scan.
Unknown, duplicate pilot, or non-PNG incoming files should block pilot import planning until renamed or removed.
Matched pilot files still need metadata QA, visual anchor review, and promotion readiness before runtime asset manifest registration.
